data.content: Deployment issue: implementation commits f0ec2a34 (fix: always fetch backend sessions on rehydration for cross-browser sync) and 5dad96ce (test: validate terminal rehydration across browser instances) are on worktree-foolery-7e6d-terminal-rehydration branch but were never merged to main/origin/main. Shipment must merge the worktree branch to main before shipment_review can proceed.
